title: abronia umbellata subsp. breviflora
intro: Abronia umbellata subsp. breviflora, also known as the short-flowered desert marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Abronia umbellata subsp. breviflora include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, salves, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
